index.html.notes: Fixed unescaped ampersands (&) in text content and Google Fonts URL

styles.css.selector_validation: PASSED — 0 dead selectors, 0 missing styles (JS classes accounted for)
features: gradient: CTA section (135deg indigo→dark), skill bars (coral→gold)
Box shadows: sm/md/lg on cards and CTAs
Hover effects: translateY(-2px/-4px) on buttons and cards
::before/::after decorations on section titles, testimonial quotes, nav links
Mobile menu toggle with aria-expanded + Escape key support + body scroll lock
Smooth scroll navigation with IntersectionObserver scroll-spy
Skills bar animation: IntersectionObserver triggers fill from 0% to target with animated counter
Testimonial carousel: dot nav, auto-play (5s), pause on hover/focus, keyboard arrows, touch swipe
Contact form: validate on blur + input, inline errors, trim whitespace, simulated submit with success state
fixes_documented: [FIX 1] Mobile menu closes on nav link click
[FIX 2] Skills bars use IntersectionObserver instead of scroll events
[FIX 3] Carousel pauses on hover/focus, resumes on leave
[FIX 4] Form trims whitespace before validation, validates on blur
[FIX 5] Scroll-spy uses IntersectionObserver threshold for accurate section detection

accessibility.aria_live: polite on error messages and status regions
